name:
HOLY THURSDAY
MASS OF THE LORD'S SUPPER

lectionary.thematicTag: Holy Thursday — Mass of the Lord's Supper

readings.summary: The Lord instructs Moses for the first Passover.

readings.citation:
Ps 116:12-13, 15-16bc, 17-18
Our blessing-cup is a communion with the Blood of Christ.
readings.antiphon: Our blessing-cup is a communion with the Blood of Christ.

readings.summary:
I give you a new commandment, says the Lord:
love one another as I have loved you.
Jesus washes the feet of his disciples.

antiphons.text:
We should glory in the Cross of our Lord Jesus Christ,
in whom is our salvation, life and resurrection,
through whom we are saved and delivered.

planningNotes: THU 7 PM — single combined celebration, all ensembles
Foot Washing follows the homily; Transfer of Blessed Sacrament closes the liturgy
Reception of Oils: Musical Setting by Ed Archer (Choral Dir: Tica)
Dismissal of Catechumens: Trevor Thomson (Choral Dir: Tica)
BUY: From An Upper Room (Joseph M. Martin)

massNotes: THU 7 PM — all ensembles combined
Reception of Oils: Musical Setting by Ed Archer (Choral Dir: Tica)
Gloria Vocal Arr: David Lockwood & Arielle Phan (Choral Dir: Arielle, minimal direction needed)
Dismissal of Catechumens: Trevor Thomson (Choral Dir: Tica)

FOOT WASHING — Wash Their Feet (Pepper Choplin) → This Is How (Chris de Silva, BPM 66/78, Choral Dir: Merrick) → The Servant Song (Richard Gillard, arr. Ed Archer, SATB, BPM ca.80/78, Choral Dir: Merrick) → Make Me a Channel of Your Peace (John Angotti, ATB, BPM ca.60/66, Choral Dir: Tica) → Jesus Christ Yesterday Today and Forever (Suzanne Toolan RSM, ostinato refrain only, Choral Dir: Tica)

EMERGENCY FOOT WASHING TUNES — Healing Waters (Trevor Thomson, BPM 96/86, Choral Dir: Merrick) | More Like Jesus (Passion, BPM 144, Choral Dir: Arielle) | Healed In Christ (Sarah Hart, BPM 76, Choral Dir: Arielle)
ALTERNATE PLAN — Emergency FW tunes same for both plans
Preparation of Altar: From An Upper Room (Joseph M. Martin, SATB, BPM ca.94/86-90, BUY, Choral Dir: Merrick) — alt: Do Not Be Afraid (Jeanne Cotter, Choral Dir: Merrick)
Presentation of Gifts: Take Lord Receive (John Foley, BPM 65/68, Choral Dir: Tica) — same both plans

Eucharistic Acclamations from Mass of Creation (Marty Haugen, arr. David Lockwood) — Holy Holy BPM 130/160, When We Eat This Bread BPM 80/82, Amen BPM 80/100 (Choral Dir: Arielle, minimal direction needed)
Lord's Prayer: Chanted Our Father (Robert J. Snow) — sing in unison with assembly
Fraction Rite: Lamb of God from Mass of Creation (Haugen, arr. Lockwood, BPM 76/78, Choral Dir: Arielle, minimal direction needed) — same both plans
Meditation: Unless A Grain of Wheat (John Angotti, SATB, BPM ca.60/64, Choral Dir: Tica) — same both plans
Transfer of Eucharist: Ubi Caritas (Jacques Berthier/Taizé, BPM 76, Choral Dir: Tica) — same both plans
Adoration 1: Pange Lingua (Chant Mode III, Liber Hymnarius, Randall DeBruyn, Choral Dir: Tica) — same both plans
Adoration 2: Stay With Me (Jacques Berthier/Taizé, Choral Dir: Tica) — same both plans

gloria.description: BPM 120 — Vocal Arr. David Lockwood & Arielle Phan — Choral Dir: Arielle (minimal direction needed)

responsorialPsalm.setting: Sarah Hart • BPM 86 — Choral Dir: Tica

gospelAcclamation.title: Praise to You, Lord Jesus Christ
gospelAcclamation.verse: I give you a new commandment, says the Lord: love one another as I have loved you.
